/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/test_posix-spawn.dir/tests/test_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-spawn.dir/tests/test_spawn.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-spawn.dir/tests/test_spawnattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-spawn.dir/tests/test_spawnp.c.o" -o test_posix-spawn.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_posix-spawn.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libposix-spawn.a
